parameter.name: topsellingproductids
parameter.label: Top Sellers Product Ids
parameter.description: Enter product ids with comma separator like 1,5,8,9

parameter.name: featuredproductcategoryids
parameter.label: Featured Products Category Ids
parameter.description: Enter category ids with comma separator like 4,5,9,11

parameter.name: cache_lifetime
parameter.label: Cache Lifetime (Seconds)
parameter.description:
Time in seconds between the widget updates.
If not set, equals to 86400 seconds (24 hours). To update widget instantly, go to Cache Management and clear Blocks HTML Output cache.
Widget will not show products that begin to match the specified conditions until cache is refreshed.
